composition_pattern: toc-field -> section-reorder -> exception-extraction -> release-matrix -> exception-register -> highlight -> appendix-pagination -> header-count-cascade -> cleanup
user_task_description: A policy manual needs exceptions extracted into tables whose counts and blocking status affect the release header and control matrix.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the manual TOC placeholder; add a real TOC field; reorder sections to Scope, Controls, Exceptions, Appendix A - Definitions, Appendix B - Evidence; remove Draft wording; generate a Release Matrix linking CTRL-1 and CTRL-2 to their exception status; generate an Exception Register; highlight the MFA exception paragraph; start both appendices on new pages; set the header to include the open-exception count; normalize footer and styles.
atomic_scope: Single-document workflow with coupled edits; preserve unrelated document-native structure.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx artifact saved to the required output path.

inspired_by.title: Create Table of contents for Annexes
